description: Scenario manifest for A-share selection skill evals. Load only the scenario file relevant to the change under review.

eval_files.description: Generic workflow, no-data, report language, and non-prediction technical profile behavior.
Prediction-derived profile, LightGBM boundary, prediction column contract, and generic-vs-prediction disclosure behavior.

Validation, allocation, backtest, portfolio, walk-forward, artifact, and real-scenario gate behavior.
